Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:worm here].

====== Class Worm ======
(inherits from [[Lua object|Object]])

===== See also: =====
[[Lua global#bindings.wormrender|bindings.wormRender]], [[Lua global#bindings.viewportrender|bindings.viewportRender]], [[Lua global#bindings.wormdeath|bindings.wormDeath]], [[Lua global#bindings.wormremoved|bindings.wormRemoved]], [[Lua networkwormevent#send|NetworkWormEvent:send]], [[Lua global#network_worm_event|network_worm_event]]

===== health =====
<pre>
 health()
</pre>

(Known as get_health before 0.9c)
Returns the [[#health]] of this worm.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618092039/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:worm -->
